name: Cranial part of muscular system
description:
CRANIAL PART OF MUSCULAR SYSTEM


-Muscles of head
    -Extra-ocular muscles
    -Superficial muscles of head
    -Intrinsic auricular muscles
    -Muscles of auditory ossicles
    -Masticatory muscles
    -Muscles of tongue
    -Muscles of soft palate
-Fasciae of head
-Bursae of head
